vllm.title: [VLM][Bugfix] Make sure that `multi_modal_kwargs` is broadcasted properly
vllm.author: xwjiang2010
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #5863
The current broadcasting logic only supports first level tensors. For multi_modal_kwargs, tensors can be nested under.
The PR extends tensor_dict flatten and unflatten functionality to be more generic (handles the above case).
Also added a unit test.
cc @ywang96 @DarkLight1337
BEFORE SUBMI

vllm.title: [Model] Add base class for LoRA-supported models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Similar to #4809, this PR adds a base class for models that support LoRA so that it becomes easier to enforce a consistent interface. The docs have also been updated to instruct users to inherit from the base class to enable LoRA support.
Note: This will break existing LoRA-supporting vLLM models th

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix img_sizes Parsing in Phi3-Vision
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the issue of retrieving height and width from img_sizes where the tensor is a 2D tensor of the shape (batch_size, 2) but the current code assumes it as a 1D tensor.
This bug did not surface for batch size 1 because of 
  
    
      vllm/vllm/model_executor/models/phi3v.py

vllm.title: [CI/Build] [1/3] Reorganize entrypoints tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To better preserve Git history, I'm splitting this process into multiple PRs.
Step 1: Split out Chat API tests to another file
Step 2: Split out Completion API tests to another file
Step 3: Move OpenAI tests to openai directory, and LLM tests to llm directory.

vllm.title: [Model][Bugfix] Implicit model flags and reenable Phi-3-Vision
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up to #5018. Just realized that we can set the default value for the flag in the interface, so subclasses no longer have to explicitly set the value of supports_vision and supports_lora.
Also, updates Phi-3-Vision to use the new interface (SupportsVision); without this, vLLM fails to consider

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `MLPSpeculator` handling of `num_speculative_tokens`
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This fix avoids loading more layers of the speculator model than necessary based on the configured num_speculative_tokens value.
The bug didn't affect the number of speculative tokens actually generated at runtime.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `min_tokens` behaviour for multiple eos tokens
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently vLLM will load and honor multiple eos tokens if defined in generation_config.json, by adding them to the stop_token_ids parameter of each request. But we aren't adding them to SamplingParams.all_stop_token_ids which is used when processing min_tokens.
This change fixes that and also avoids

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Fix Args for `_get_logits_warper` in Sampler Test
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
huggingface/transformers#29804 in the latest transformers release introduced a breaking change in our CI sampler test. This PR adds the required device arg into the function call.
Current CI error:
[2024-06-27T18:00:49Z] >       warpers = generation_model._get_logits_warper(generation_config)--| 
[2

vllm.title: [Model] Add Gemma 2
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds Gemma 2, a new family of open LLMs from Google.
Two major issues to note:

Attention logit soft-capping: Gemma 2 models soft-cap the attention logits. This requires changes to all the attention kernels vLLM is using, so this PR removes soft-capping as a temporary workaround. While this

vllm.title: [core][misc] remove logical block
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
it turns out we don't need logical blocks 👀
subpart of code separated from #5877
the same benchmark command:
python benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --output-len 256 --input 256 --model meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf -tp 8
the same machine: 8*H100
before (current main): Throughput: 38.07 requests/s, 194

vllm.title: [Kernel][ROCm][AMD] fused_moe Triton configs v2 for mi300X
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR is the 2nd version for the tuned fused_moe Triton kernel for mi300X. These config files provide ~10% performance gain.

vllm.title: [Hardware][TPU] Optimize KV cache swapping
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the swapping operation inadvertently copies the entire CPU KV cache into GPU, which is very slow. This PR optimizes this.
